---
title: "validate_phrases.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/scripts/validate_phrases.py"
loc: 54
complexity: 17
logic_score: 0.90
style_score: 3.80
intel_score: 4.36
overall_score: 2.82
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating validate_persona_phrases, main. It exists to support broader Python integration routines. Its role in the system is to provide foundational utilities for script execution.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 0.9/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 4.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 11 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [sys](file://sys)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [yaml](file://yaml)

### Exports
- `validate_persona_phrases`
- `main`
